encounter_context.encounter_reason: 68-year-old man with COPD and insulin-dependent diabetes presenting with worsening dyspnea; home oxygen dependence and missed q8h insulin doses.

active_problems: Acute on chronic hypoxemic respiratory failure
Hyperglycemia after missed q8h insulin doses
recent_changes: Required 4 L oxygen in the ED instead of baseline 2 L.
Last scheduled q8h insulin dose was missed before arrival.

medications.name: Insulin
medications.why_important: If q8h insulin is omitted, glucose rises rapidly and patient becomes clinically unstable.

medications.name: Nebulized bronchodilators
medications.why_important: Airway support for COPD exacerbation; omission risks respiratory decompensation.

safety_critical_facts: If q8h insulin is omitted, glucose rises rapidly and patient becomes clinically unstable.
Oxygen requirement above baseline must be monitored closely.

supporting_source_excerpts.label: Nursing note
supporting_source_excerpts.text: Patient missed the afternoon q8h insulin dose before arrival.

supporting_source_excerpts.label: Respiratory therapy note
supporting_source_excerpts.text: Now requiring 4 L oxygen; baseline is 2 L at home.
